---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# show the code on the website
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library("tidyverse")
```

```{r analyze_data}
dataframe <- read.delim("data_clinical_patient.txt", comment.char="#")
# Task 1: filter out so only Stage 3 and 4, then count
number <- dataframe %>%
  filter(AJCC_PATHOLOGIC_TUMOR_STAGE %in% c("Stage III", "Stage IIIA", "Stage IIIB", "Stage IIIC", "Stage IV"))  %>% 
  count()
number

# Task 2: count patients by cancer subtype, sorted from most to least common
result <- dataframe %>% 
  group_by(HISTOLOGICAL_DIAGNOSIS) %>% 
  summarise(count = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(count))
result

# Task 3: convert months to years by creating new column
dataframe$OS_MONTHS <- as.numeric(dataframe$OS_MONTHS)
result <- dataframe %>%
  mutate(OS_YEARS = OS_MONTHS / 12)

# Task 4: plot histogram of patient age, add vertical line at mean age
dataframe$AGE <- as.numeric(dataframe$AGE)
mean_age <- mean(dataframe$AGE, na.rm = TRUE)
ggplot(dataframe, aes(x = AGE)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean_age) +
  labs(title = "Histogram of Patient Age", x = "Age", y = "Count")

# Task 5: bar chart of patient counts by cancer stage
ggplot(dataframe, aes(x = AJCC_PATHOLOGIC_TUMOR_STAGE)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(title = "Patient Counts by Cancer Stage", x = "Cancer Stage", y = "Count")

# Task 6: scatterplot of age vs survival years colored by subtype
ggplot(result, aes(x=AGE, y=OS_YEARS, color=HISTOLOGICAL_DIAGNOSIS)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Age vs Survival Years by Cancer Subtype", x = "Age", y = "Survival Years") +
  theme_minimal()
```
